bentazepam.dose_note: NOTE: Liver damage has been reported by users. If you are using this substance for a prolonged period of time it is recommended to get testing done on your liver.
bentazepam.name: bentazepam

properties.dose: Light: 15-30mg Common: 30-50mg Strong: 50-75mg+ | NOTE: Liver damage has been reported by users. If you are using this substance for a prolonged period of time it is recommended to get testing done on your liver.
properties.summary: Thienodiazepine that is an effective anxiolyric. Liver damage among other concerns have been reported.

_general: Bentazepam versus Clorazepate in the treatment of anxiety disorders. http://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0011393X05804357
